items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 awesomesauce game. I lololololovee my ba
items.summary: awesomesauce game. I lololololovee my baby boo Pickman and my handsome, incredible, talented king captain Elton!!! I'm already @ keeper lvl 50 with only 31 days of playtime (started playing during the 1st anniv. and have only been able to play again recently). Absolutely adore this game. As an f2p 4lifer, this is defo on the no. 1 spot in my games list.
items.author: Ash Gomez (Ace)

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 amazing game, I very used to gachas and
items.summary: amazing game, I very used to gachas and tried CZN before this but morimens is so much better and elite. story, characters gameplay is amazing. super generous with their pulls too that it makes me want to whale! only bad thing is that this isn't very popular and also PvP sucks and my game is still prone to freezing compared to other games - take what you can get
items.author: Kim Mai

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 If you want something dark/thriller card
items.summary: If you want something dark/thriller card based strategic turn based genre, Morimens is highly recommended for you. It's just few days since I played this game, and it giving me hype due to art style and flow of the story.
